sql_array: CREATE TABLE json_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data CLOB);
INSERT INTO json_test (id, data) VALUES (1, json '[1, 2, 3]');
INSERT INTO json_test (id, data) VALUES (2, json '[4, 5, 6]');
SELECT json.text(data) FROM json_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE json_test SET data = json '[7, 8, 9]' WHERE id = 2;
